name: Chinese Egg Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift 1 cup of all-purpose flour into a bowl.
2. Gradually add the remaining water to form a thin, smooth batter.
3. Beat in 2 eggs and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
4. Grease a 6-inch diameter skillet and place over low heat.
5. Beat the batter and pour 1 tablespoon into the pan.
6. Allow it to spread over the bottom of the pan to form a thin pancake.
7. Turn the pancake when it begins to pull away from the sides of the pan.
8. Do not allow it to brown or become crisp.
9. Remove when done and place on a dish. Cover with a damp cloth until ready to use.
10. Prepare the remaining egg roll shells the same way.
11. Heat 3 tablespoons peanut oil in a wok or large heavy skillet.
12. Finely chop the scallions.
13. Thoroughly drain and chop the water chestnuts.
14. Remove shrimp from their shells, devein, and chop.
15. Stir fry celery, cabbage, and scallions for a few moments.
16. Add the chopped shrimp and cooked pork and stir fry for 3 minutes.
17. Add water chestnuts, bean sprouts, minced garlic, soy sauce, grated gingerroot, and sugar and stir fry for 5 more minutes.
18. Allow the filling to cool.
19. Place 4 tablespoons of filling in the center of each pancake.
20. Fold the pancakes envelope style.
21. Heat fat in a deep fryer to 375 degrees (or use oil in a skillet).
22. Fry until golden brown.
23. Serve with Chinese hot mustard, soy sauce, or Oriental Sweet & Sour Sauce.
